transcript:
CALLER: Good afternoon. I'm calling about my biopsy report. It was supposed to be ready today.
AGENT: Good afternoon. I understand this must be an anxious wait. Your name please?
CALLER: Santosh Kulkarni.
AGENT: Santosh ji, biopsy reports are handled directly by our pathology and histopathology teams. I don't have access to report status from here, and I wouldn't want to speculate on something as sensitive as a biopsy.
CALLER: Can you at least find out if it's ready?
AGENT: I understand — this is important. The right people to confirm this are our pathology staff. Let me connect you to them immediately so they can give you an accurate update.
CALLER: Please, yes.
AGENT: Connecting you now — please hold for our staff.
